_comment: Registry for the agentic-workflow kit sync (distribute_kit.py). The canonical source is kriegerdataforge-cicd/kit/common/. 'files' are the byte-identical, language-agnostic kit paths synced to every repo in 'repos'. check mode reports drift; distribute mode opens one PR per drifted repo (never auto-merges). See ADR D-001 / kriegerdataforge/docs/epics/agent-kit-distribution.md.
_excluded_notes: kriegerdataforge-cicd is the SOURCE — its own kit/common IS the canonical, so it is not a sync target (no self-PRs). The 4 kriegerdataforge-template-* repos ARE included (epic slice P2 complete: committed + is_template): keeping them in sync here means a /generate'd repo is born current, so no kit-injection is needed in issue-create-repo.yml. .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md is intentionally NOT in 'files' (per-repo by ADR D-002; the synced docs/agent/DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md is the canonical DoD). AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules / .github/copilot-instructions.md are per-repo and never synced. A kit sync PR is docs-only; each repo's version-check skips it because the central scripts/common/check_version.py exempts kit-only PRs (ADR D-001 option B).
